---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the runner or the standard
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To reproduce

Steps and the exact command, e.g.:

```sh
./agssh -config .airgap.yml -profile Gold
```

## Expected vs actual

- **Expected:**
- **Actual:** (include exit code and relevant report output)

## Environment

- `agssh` version / commit:
- OS & arch:
- Go version (if building from source):
- Optional scanners on PATH (gitleaks / osv-scanner / cosign):

## Additional context

Anything else (logs, `agssh-report.json`, surface details).
